An aircraft is flying from position A 53°24’N, 015°54’E to B 32°00’N, 052°51’W. Given the information below, calculate the Estimated Time of Departure ETD from A, expressed in Standard Time A STA.Distance according to the flight plan: 3150 NM.

Average GS: 450 kt.
Difference between Standard Time A and UTC: 1 hour.
Difference between Standard Time B and UTC: 4 hours.
Estimated Time of Arrival ETA at B: 10:00 STB on the 5th August.
